layout.workspaceSetupIssueBody: Unable to set up your workspace membership. Sign out and sign in again, then retry.
layout.workspaceSetupIssueSupport: If it keeps failing, contact support with your account email and request tenant bootstrap.

home.title: SnapConsent
home.subtitle: Consent collection, project invites, and photo linking for teams that need a clear workflow instead of a patchwork of folders and links.
home.openAppBody: Sign in to manage projects, invites, assets, and linked consents.
home.currentScopeBody: This build focuses on projects, consent invites, subject headshots, manual photo linking, and internal face-matching workflows.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Use your Supabase email and password.

members.title: Organization users
members.subtitle: Invite people, adjust organization roles, and manage pending organization invites.
members.readOnly: Only workspace owners and admins can manage organization members.

delegated.readOnly: You can view organization users, but owner/admin-only controls are hidden.
delegated.inviteHelper: You can invite reviewers and photographers. Role changes and removals are limited to allowed reviewer and photographer rows.
delegated.mutationHelper: You can update or remove allowed reviewer and photographer rows. Owner, admin, and your own row stay read-only.
delegated.inviteSubtitle: Delegated invites can only be sent for reviewers and photographers.
delegated.membersSubtitle: Role changes and removals are available only where allowed. Custom roles and reviewer access remain owner/admin-managed.
delegated.pendingInvitesSubtitle: Pending admin invites are visible here but remain read-only.
delegated.ownInvitesSubtitle: You can manage only the pending reviewer and photographer invites you created.
delegated.empty: No organization users or pending invites are visible for your current access.
delegated.inviteForbidden: You can only invite reviewers and photographers.
delegated.inviteMutationForbidden: You can only resend or revoke pending reviewer and photographer invites you created.
delegated.resendForbidden: Unable to resend this invite with your current access.
delegated.revokeForbidden: Unable to revoke this invite with your current access.
delegated.roleChangeForbidden: You cannot change organization user roles with your current access.
delegated.removeForbidden: You cannot remove organization users with your current access.
delegated.targetForbidden: This organization user is protected from that action.
delegated.selfTargetForbidden: You cannot change or remove your own organization row.
delegated.invalidRole: Select reviewer or photographer for delegated role changes.
delegated.roleChangeFallback: Unable to update this member role.

roleDescriptions.owner: Full organization access with protected ownership.
roleDescriptions.admin: Full organization access except owner protection.
roleDescriptions.reviewer: Eligible for review access. Projects require tenant-wide or project-specific grants.
roleDescriptions.photographer: Capture and upload access in assigned project workspaces.

roleReference.title: Role reference
roleReference.subtitle: Fixed roles map to these current capabilities.
roleReference.ownerProtected: Owners are read-only, non-inviteable, and non-removable in this slice.

invite.title: Invite member
invite.subtitle: Invites are sent by email and reuse an existing account when the invited email already belongs to one.
invite.success: Invite saved and queued for delivery.
invite.alreadyMember: That email already belongs to a member in this workspace.

membersTable.title: Current members
membersTable.subtitle: Owners are visible here but stay protected from role changes and removal.
membersTable.removalExplanation: Removing a user only removes access to this organization. The auth account is not deleted, and the user may still belong to other organizations.

customRoles.definitionOnlyNote: Custom roles define reusable permission bundles. Owners and admins manage role definitions and assignments.

workflow.workspaceUnavailable: Select a workspace to view workflow actions.
workflow.workspaceActiveHelper: Capture stays open until this workspace is handed off.
workflow.projectActiveHelper: Finalize the project after every workspace is validated and blockers are clear.
workflow.projectReadyHelper: All visible workspaces are validated and ready for finalization.
workflow.projectCorrectionOpenHelper: Corrections stay review-only and will publish a new release version when finalized.
workflow.projectCorrectionReadyHelper: Correction workspaces are validated again and ready to publish a new release version.
workflow.captureLockedHandedOff: Authenticated capture changes are locked after handoff. Existing public links can still be completed until validation.
workflow.captureLockedValidated: Authenticated capture changes are locked while this workspace is validated.
workflow.reviewLockedValidated: Review changes are locked while this workspace is validated. Reopen it to make corrections.
workflow.reviewLockedCorrectionValidated: This workspace is validated again. Reopen it for correction before making more review changes.
workflow.projectFinalizedReadOnly: This project is finalized. Capture, review, staffing, and template changes are read-only.
workflow.projectCorrectionCaptureLocked: Correction is open. Capture uploads, staffing, and template changes stay locked. Reopened workspaces can still send correction consent requests from the review surface.
workflow.projectCorrectionConsentIntakeHelper: This reopened correction workspace can send one-off correction invites, consent upgrades, and recurring project consent requests. Capture uploads stay locked.
workflow.projectArchivedReadOnly: This project is archived, so workflow changes are unavailable.
workflow.staffingLockedFinalized: Workspace staffing is locked after project finalization.
